zh.lifeSummary: 當David Egerton於大約1228年出生在英國爾艾格頓時，他的父親Philip Gogh de Egerton33歲，母親Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton29歲。他於1254年與Cecily Thornton在英國英格蘭爾艾格頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1316年7月8日在英國爾馬爾帕斯享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Egerton于大约1228年出生在英国爾艾格頓时，他的父亲Philip Gogh de Egerton33岁，母亲Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton29岁。他于1254年与Cecily Thornton在英国英格兰爾艾格頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1316年7月8日在英国爾馬爾帕斯享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Egerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Edgerton  .

variants.name: Edgerton
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Egerton in Cheshire and Kent, Egerton in Wheathill (Shropshire), Egerton in Bolton le Moors (Lancashire), Egerton in Scammonden (Yorkshire), or Edgerton in Huddersfield (Yorkshire). Egerton in Kent is from the Old English personal name Ecgheard + Old English tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ (see Eckert ), but Egerton in Chesire is more likely to derive from the Old English personal name Ecghere (in which the second element is Old English here ‘army’) + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When David Egerton was born about 1228, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, his father, Philip Gogh de Egerton, was 33 and his mother, Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton, was 29. He married Cecily Thornton in 1254, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 July 1316, in Malpas, Cheshire, England, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Egerton est né environ 1228, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip Gogh d’Egerton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Cecily Thornton en 1254, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 juillet 1316, à Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Egerton um 1228 in Egerton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip Gogh de Egerton 33 und seine Mutter Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton 29. Er hat 1254 in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Cecily Thornton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Juli 1316 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Malpas, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Egerton è nato il circa 1228 nel Egerton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Philip Gogh de Egerton, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Cecily Thornton nel 1254, nel Egerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 luglio 1316, nel Malpas, Cheshire, England, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.Egerton, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアエジャートン
ja.lifeSummary: David Egertonが約1228年にイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンで生まれた時，父Philip Gogh de Egertonは33歳，母Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hultonは29歳であった。1254年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンでCecily Thorntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1316年7月8日にイギリスチェシュアイアマルプアスで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David Egerton(이)가 대략 1228년 영국 체실르 거턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip Gogh de Egerton(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1254년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 거턴에서 Cecily Thornton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 7월 8일 영국 체실르 맬파스에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Egerton nasceu aproximadamente 1228, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip Gogh de Egerton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily Thornton em 1254, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de julho de 1316, em Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Egerton родился около 1228 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Philip Gogh de Egerton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily Thornton в 1254 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 июля 1316 г. в местности малпас, чешир, Англия в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Egerton nació aproximadamente 1228, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Philip Gogh de Egerton, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Cecily Thornton en 1254, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de julio de 1316, en Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años.
